Terms Condition page - Terms condition page
intersection - should return the intersection of two arrays
intersection - should return an empty array if there is no intersection between two arrays
intersection - should handle empty arrays as inputs without throwing an error

convertHtmlToString - should replace
with a space
convertHtmlToString - should replace all HTML tags with an empty string
convertHtmlToString - should return an empty string when passed an empty string
convertHtmlToString - should return the same string when passed a plain text string
errorHelper - should return an error object when passed an instance of Error
errorHelper - should return an object with a message property when passed a non-Error object
errorHelper - should return an object with a message property when passed a non-object value
titleCase - should return a string with the first letter of each word capitalized
titleCase - should return an empty string if passed an empty string
titleCase - should handle strings with multiple words
titleCase - should handle strings with special characters
titleCase - should handle strings with numbers
validationPhoneNumber - should return true when valid phone number is passed
validationPhoneNumber - should return true when valid phone number is passed
validationPhoneNumber - should return false when invalid phone number is passed
validationPhoneNumber - should return false when empty string is passed
validationEmail - should return true when valid email is passed
validationEmail - should return false when invalid email is passed
validationEmail - should return false when empty string is passed
compareNumbers - should return the difference between two numbers
compareNumbers - should return 0 if two numbers are equal
compareNumbers - should return a negative number if the first number is smaller than the second number
compareNumbers - should return a positive number if the first number is greater than the second number
getPercent - should return a percentage value
getPercent - should default to 2 decimal places
getPercent - should return 0 if not provided valid arguments
getPercent - should return 0 if arguments NaN
objectMap - should call the callback for each key
objectMap - should map the objects keys and values as expected
getBold - should return the string with the keyword in bold
getBold - should return the original string
getUrl - should replace the url with a link
getUrl - should not replace the string if no url is present
customFormData - should return a FormData object
customFormData - should append the keys and values to the FormData object
